feat.name: Gecko's Grip
feat.special: If you have the cliffscale lizardfolk heritage, you instead gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.
feat.text: You cling to walls with a preternatural grip. You gain the Combat Climber feat as a bonus feat, and if you roll a success on an Athletics check to climb, you get a critical success instead.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
